ddls:
CREATE TABLE "deployments" (
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deployment */,
  "deployment_name" TEXT /* Name of the deployment */,
  "deployment_type" TEXT /* Type of the deployment (e.g., telemetered, recovered_host) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the deployment (e.g., latitude, longitude) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the deployment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the deployment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the deployment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of the instrument (e.g., adcpt_acfgm_pd8_dcl) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the instrument */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the instrument */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Calibration date of the instrument */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variables" (
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variable */,
  "variable_name" TEXT /* Name of the variable (e.g., temperature, speed_of_sound) */,
  "long_name" TEXT /* Long name of the variable (e.g., Sea Surface Temperature) */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Standard name of the variable (e.g., sea_surface_temperature) */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of the variable (e.g., ºC, m s-1) */,
  "units_long_name" TEXT /* Long name of the units (e.g., Degrees Celsius) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "streams" (
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stream */,
  "stream_name" TEXT /* Name of the stream (e.g., adcpt_acfgm_pd8_dcl_instrument) */,
  "stream_type" TEXT /* Type of the stream (e.g., raw, processed) */,
  "stream_format" TEXT /* Format of the stream (e.g., netCDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stream_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the deployment the dataset belongs to */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument used for data collection */,
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stream the dataset belongs to */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variable measured by the instrument */,
  "preferred_method" TEXT /* Preferred method of data collection (e.g., telemetered) */,
  "n_all" INTEGER /* Total number of data points in the dataset */,
  "n_nans" INTEGER /* Number of NaN values in the dataset */,
  "n_fillvalues" INTEGER /* Number of fill values in the dataset */,
  "n_grange" INTEGER /* Number of values within the global range */,
  "n_outliers" INTEGER /* Number of outliers in the dataset */,
  "n_stats" INTEGER /* Number of statistical values in the dataset */,
  "percent_valid_data" REAL /* Percentage of valid data in the dataset */,
  "mean" REAL /* Mean value of the dataset */,
  "min" REAL /* Minimum value of the dataset */,
  "max" REAL /* Maximum value of the dataset */,
  "stdev" REAL /* Standard deviation of the dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the dataset */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Creation date of the dataset */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Update date of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_variable_id FOREIGN KEY ("variable_id") REFERENCES variables ("variable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_deployment_id FOREIGN KEY ("deployment_id") REFERENCES deployments ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_stream_id FOREIGN KEY ("stream_id") REFERENCES streams ("stream_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "global_ranges" (
  "global_range_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each global range */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variable the global range belongs to */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the global range */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the global range */,
  "global_range_name" TEXT /* Name of the global range */,
  "global_range_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the global range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("global_range_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_global_ranges_variable_id FOREIGN KEY ("variable_id") REFERENCES variables ("variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fill_values" (
  "fill_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fill value */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variable the fill value belongs to */,
  "fill_value" REAL /* Value used to fill missing data */,
  "fill_value_name" TEXT /* Name of the fill value */,
  "fill_value_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the fill value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fill_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fill_values_variable_id FOREIGN KEY ("variable_id") REFERENCES variables ("variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "preferred_methods" (
  "preferred_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preferred method */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument the preferred method belongs to */,
  "preferred_method" TEXT /* Preferred method of data collection (e.g., telemetered) */,
  "preferred_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the preferred method */,
  "preferred_method_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the preferred method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preferred_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_preferred_methods_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the file (e.g., netCDF, CSV) */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user who accessed the dataset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user who accessed the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
